metadata.description: Multi-plugin marketplace for research-driving skills (claude.ai Research, chatgpt.com Deep Research) that attach to a logged-in Chrome via Chrome DevTools MCP.

plugins.name: claudeai
plugins.description: Run claude.ai Research queries from Codex CLI via Chrome DevTools MCP, using your existing logged-in Chrome session.

plugins.name: chatgpt
plugins.description: Run chatgpt.com Deep Research queries via Chrome DevTools MCP, using your existing logged-in ChatGPT session.
